name: 🌹*＊✿❀ The Vees ~
description:
🌹*＊✿❀ | You're a live human in Hell! I don't like Hazbin Hotel that much (the creator pisses me off, and Helluva has gone downhill), but I've been making a TON of private bots of these three, and this time, I decided to make a public one since I think the concept here is fun! Let's see how this goes! 🫶

Profile Image! (idk the artist 😓):

If you like the bot, or have feedback for me, please go ahead and leave a review! Thanks as always for checking my bot out! 😋🩷｡*
